type Ticker inherits String
type Quantity inherits Decimal
type AveragePrice inherits Decimal
type Notional inherits Decimal

  id : String
  ticker : Ticker
  quantity : Quantity
  averagePrice : AveragePrice
}

  id : String
  investor : InvestorId
  positions : Position[]
}
service PortfolioService {
  operation getPortfolio(investor : InvestorId) : Portfolio
  operation addTrade(investor : InvestorId, ticker : Ticker, quantity : Quantity, averagePrice : AveragePrice) : Position
  operation computeTotalNotional(portfolio : Portfolio) : Notional
}
